applicable_rules: IEC required for commercial importers under DGFT Importer Exporter Code requirements before filing a bill of entry.

hs_rules.description: Mobile phones imported into India should be checked for BIS CRS coverage before domestic sale or distribution.
hs_rules.citation: BIS Compulsory Registration Scheme for Electronics and IT Goods applies to regulated electronic goods including mobile handsets.
hs_rules.warning: Verify BIS CRS registration details for the handset brand or manufacturer before import clearance.

hs_rules.description: Food imports require FSSAI licensing and import-clearance checks.
hs_rules.citation: Food Safety and Standards Act, 2006 and FSSAI import clearance requirements govern food imports into India.
hs_rules.warning: Confirm FSSAI importer license, product approval status, and labeling review before shipment.

hs_rules.description: Pharmaceutical and medical-device imports may require CDSCO registration or import licensing.
hs_rules.citation: CDSCO import registration and licensing controls apply under the Drugs and Cosmetics regulatory framework.
hs_rules.warning: Confirm CDSCO registration, import license, or NOC pathway before dispatch.

default_warnings: Validate labeling, packaging, and country-of-origin marking before filing.
notes: BIS, IEC, FSSAI, and CDSCO obligations are product-dependent and should be evidenced in the customs clearance file.
